evals.description: Triggers when asked to write unit tests with Jest
evals.prompt: Write unit tests for this utility function using Jest: function clamp(value, min, max) { return Math.min(Math.max(value, min), max); }
Show me how to write a well-structured Vitest test for a shopping cart's addItem method

evals.description: Can mock a module with vi.mock
evals.prompt: How do I mock an axios HTTP call in Vitest so my tests don't make real network requests?

evals.description: Can test async code with async/await
evals.prompt: Write a Vitest test for an async function fetchUser(id) that either returns a user object or throws 'User not found'

evals.description: Can use fake timers for debounce testing
evals.prompt: How do I test a debounced function in Vitest without waiting for real timers?

evals.description: Can configure Vitest for a React project
evals.prompt: Show me a vitest.config.ts for a React project with jsdom, coverage at 80%, and testing-library setup

evals.description: Can test React components with getByRole queries
evals.prompt: Write a Vitest + React Testing Library test for a button that shows a success message when clicked

evals.description: Warns against getByTestId over role-based queries
evals.prompt: What query should I use to find a submit button in my React Testing Library tests?

evals.description: Explains when and when NOT to use snapshots
evals.prompt: Should I use snapshot tests for all my React components?

evals.description: Can explain coverage metrics and branch coverage
evals.prompt: My Jest coverage shows 90% statements but only 60% branches. What does that mean and how do I fix it?

evals.description: Identifies the anti-pattern of mocking internal helpers
evals.prompt: I'm mocking my own internal helper functions inside the module I'm testing. Is that a good approach?

evals.description: Does not trigger for Playwright or Cypress e2e testing
evals.prompt: How do I write a Playwright test that logs into my app and checks the dashboard loads?
